grip: BLOCKED (exit 1)

blocking violations (1):
  ✖ [test.vacuous-contract] src/checkout (src/checkout/checkout.spec.ts:1) — module src/checkout's boundary-contract test checkout.spec.ts::places order at src/checkout/checkout.spec.ts:1 kills none of its 8 mutants — the contract is vacuous; assert real behavior so a broken implementation fails the test.
